label: Subcamera
description: Defines an auxiliary Unity camera and render target used internally by SubcameraDriver, such as the water-depth mask or the gravship silhouette mask.

layer.label: Layer
layer.description: Name of the Unity layer this camera's culling mask is resolved from. Empty or missing means the camera renders nothing.

depth.label: Depth
depth.description: Render-queue depth/priority of the generated camera. Higher values render on top of lower ones.

format.label: Format
format.description: Render texture format used for the camera's render target. Falls back to a simpler supported format at runtime if the platform does not support the requested one.

startEnabled.label: Start enabled
startEnabled.description: Whether the generated Unity camera starts enabled.

doNotUpdate.label: Do not update
doNotUpdate.description: If true, the render texture is captured once and never refreshed.

backgroundColor.label: Background color
backgroundColor.description: Camera clear color, RGBA in the 0-1 float range.
